title: Implementing DeepMind innovation: Deep research API
summary: Google DeepMind has developed a Deep Research API that enables agents powered by Gemini to perform comprehensive research tasks. The session demonstrates how to implement these techniques using Google Cloud infrastructure.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech video covers the Deep Research API, a Google DeepMind technique that lets Gemini-powered agents carry out comprehensive research tasks with improved performance. It matters because the API is available through Google Cloud, giving developers a path to build these research capabilities into their own applications. The key takeaways: the work originates from DeepMind, it centers on multi-agent systems running on Gemini, and access is delivered via Google Cloud.
